description: Helper class that maintains a 3D position and orientation for a camera and provides multiple methods for manipulating the camera's position and direction. This class is used for the viewportCamera palette component.

members.name: dir
members.description: Get or set the direction of the camera as a vector that points towards the target. Up is considered to be (0,1,0).

members.name: pivot
members.description: Get or set the 3D point in space where the camera will pivot around or towards.

members.name: position
members.description: Get or set the 3D point in space where the camera is located.

methods.name: blendCamera
methods.description: Returns a camera that is blended with the given camera using the blendFactor. The camera position is blended using linear interpolation, while the rotation is blended using spherical linear interpolation. * targetCamera - A second camera that is the blend target. * blendfactor - A blend value between 0 and 1."

methods.name: dolly
methods.description: Move the camera away or towards the pivot point.

methods.name: frameBounds
methods.description: Set the camera to frame the given bounding box. Returns the width of the framed scene that can be used when setting up orthographic projections.

methods.name: look
methods.description: Pivot the camera around its position.

methods.name: move3D
methods.description: Move the camera using data from a 3D mouse.

methods.name: pan
methods.description: Pan the camera in a 2D plane facing the pivot point.

methods.name: track
methods.description: Move the camera up/down in the Y-Axis or left/right.

methods.name: tumble
methods.description: Rotate the camera around the pivot point.

methods.name: walk
methods.description: Move the camera forward/back along in the ZX plane and rotate around its position.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the Camera Class wiki page
